title: Shimla, Himachal Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Shimla, Himachal Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Shimla is a city in Himachal Pradesh with a population of 170,000. The summer capital of British India, a charming Himalayan hill station with colonial architecture, scenic views, and the Kalka-Shimla railway.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
